summary: Excellent matrix recording with crisp soundboard detail and a pleasant touch of audience ambience.
review: The reviewer praises this version as the best‑sounding copy, noting a crystal‑clear soundboard feed complemented by just enough audience ambiance to capture the live feel. No specific musical performance details are mentioned, so the assessment focuses on the high‑quality recording rather than the show itself.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights superb audio quality; lacking performance commentary keeps confidence low but overall rating remains high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp soundboard clarity with tasteful audience ambience; reviewer sampled multiple copies and found this one the best.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on performance or set structure were provided.
